case_title: MOSSER, NEVEO vs. COOPER, BROOK ELISE et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION GIVING PROPERTY MANAGER AUTHORITY TO SUE ON OWNERS BEHALF FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOSSER, NEVEO

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MOSSER, NEVEO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COOPER, BROOK ELISE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 350 TURK ST #T1609, LEASE FORFEITED, NOTATION PER CRC 522 DONE.

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT COOPER, BROOK ELISE
